mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive forward S&P 500 returns over a one-month horizon.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns show no statistical significance against a zero-mean null.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate increase exceeding 0.4 percentage points signals sudden labor market deterioration, triggering immediate negative equity repricing within one week.
failure_condition: S&P 500 delivers positive 5-day returns in more than 55% of triggered months over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates broad-based consumer demand strength, driving positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to produce positive 60-day returns in at least 60% of historical occurrences.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production during periods of low inflation confirms sustainable capacity utilization, supporting positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO momentum yields negative 20-day returns in over 50% of low-inflation months across a 10-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer price index levels erode real purchasing power and prompt anticipatory monetary tightening, generating negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Higher CPIAUCSL values correlate with positive 5-day forward returns with a rank IC exceeding 0.04 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment growth surpassing 250,000 jobs per month signals robust economic momentum, sustaining positive equity performance over a three-month horizon.
failure_condition: Months with payroll growth above 250k produce negative 60-day returns in more than 55% of cases over a 7-year evaluation period.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising GDP growth and falling housing starts indicates a shift from residential to broader economic demand, creating positive equity momentum over one month.
failure_condition: The GDPC1-HOUST divergence signal yields a negative rank IC over consecutive 2-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a monetary tightening cycle reflects capacity constraints and profit margin compression, triggering immediate negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Negative INDPRO changes during high-rate environments produce positive 5-day returns in over 60% of observed instances.
